raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Legislature faces a projected budget deficit of at least $37.86 billion for the coming fiscal year.",
    "The Governor proposes to maintain $3.4 billion toward addressing homelessness in 2023-24.",
    "The proposed budget maintains $1.1 billion for Homeless Housing, Assistance, and Prevention (HHAP) grants.",
    "The proposed budget increases state funding for Homeless Education Technical Assistance Centers to support students experiencing homelessness.",
    "The proposed budget increases annual funding for Children and Youth Behavioral Health Initiative Wellness Coaches to serve at-risk youth.",
    "These investments aim to prevent California’s youth from entering a cycle of homelessness and its societal costs.",
    "Senate Bill 333 provides targeted monthly financial support to homeless students pursuing higher education or career paths."
  ]
}
```
